Product Overview - NotebookLM Prompt

NotebookLM prompt for generating the HeyZack product overview deck

NotebookLM Prompt: HeyZack Product Overview Deck

Instructions for NotebookLM

Create a 10-slide product overview presentation for HeyZack, showcasing the complete smart home product ecosystem. The presentation should be clean, informative, and organized by product category.

Brand Styling Requirements

Colors (use consistently):

  • Primary Blue: #243984 — Category headers, trust elements
  • Primary Pink: #E82F89 — Product counts, accents
  • Gradient: Blue to Pink — Title and closing slides
  • Background: White (#FFFFFF) or light grey (#F8FAFC)

Typography:

  • Headlines: Bold sans-serif, 48-64px
  • Body: Clean sans-serif, 18-24px
  • Numbers: Extra bold for product counts

Visual Style:

  • Clean product photography
  • White backgrounds for product images
  • Organized grids and layouts
  • Category icons for quick scanning

Slide-by-Slide Content

SLIDE 1: Title

Headline: HeyZack Product Ecosystem Subhead: 128 Products. 15 Categories. One Platform. Visual: Gradient background, logo centered Style: High impact, simple

SLIDE 2: Product Philosophy

Headline: Complete Control. One System.

Body: Every HeyZack device is designed to work together seamlessly—from lighting to climate to security.

3 Pillars:

  1. Interoperability — All devices communicate on one platform
  2. Simplicity — One app, one setup process
  3. Intelligence — AI optimization built into every interaction

Visual: Product ecosystem overview image

SLIDE 3: Ecosystem Overview

Headline: The Complete Ecosystem

Large Number: 128 Products Total

Category Breakdown:

CategoryProducts
Climate Control14
Security19
Energy Management12
Lighting18
Access Control13
Sensors13
Curtains & Shades29
Gateways4

Visual: Category icons in grid layout

SLIDE 4: Climate Control

Headline: Climate Control — 14 Products Subhead: Perfect Comfort, Efficient Energy

Featured Products:

  • Smart Thermostat — Central HVAC control
  • Radiator Valve — Zone-by-zone heating
  • IR Remote — Air conditioner control
  • Temperature Sensor — Room-level monitoring

Key Benefit: “20-30% energy savings with AI optimization”

Visual: 4 product photos in grid

SLIDE 5: Security

Headline: Security — 19 Products Subhead: Peace of Mind, Always On

Featured Products:

  • Video Doorbell — See who’s at your door
  • Indoor Camera — Monitor any room
  • Outdoor Camera — Perimeter protection
  • Motion Sensor — Detect movement instantly

Key Benefit: “24/7 monitoring ready, cloud or local storage”

Visual: 4 product photos in grid

SLIDE 6: Energy Management

Headline: Energy Management — 12 Products Subhead: Track, Optimize, Save

Featured Products:

  • Smart Breaker — Circuit-level control
  • Energy Monitor — Real-time consumption
  • Smart Plug — Appliance-level management
  • Load Controller — Heavy load automation

Key Benefit: “Real-time consumption tracking and optimization”

Visual: 4 product photos in grid

SLIDE 7: Lighting

Headline: Lighting — 18 Products Subhead: Set the Perfect Mood

Featured Products:

  • Smart Dimmer — Smooth brightness control
  • LED Driver — Constant current/voltage
  • RGB Controller — Full color spectrum
  • Scene Switch — One-tap scenes

Key Benefit: “Voice control, app control, automation ready”

Visual: 4 product photos with lighting effects

SLIDE 8: Additional Categories

Headline: More Categories

4-Category Grid:

Access Control (13)Sensors (13)
Smart locks, keypad entry, digital cylindersMotion, door/window, temperature, humidity
Curtains & Shades (29)Gateways (4)
Motors, controllers, tracks, tubularZigbee, WiFi, Matter hubs

Visual: Representative product for each category

SLIDE 9: Connectivity

Headline: Universal Connectivity

Protocols Supported:

  • Zigbee 3.0 — Primary protocol (most devices)
  • WiFi — Select devices (cameras, gateways)
  • Matter — Future ready
  • Thread — Future ready

App Features:

  • iOS and Android apps
  • Voice assistant integration (Alexa, Google, Siri)
  • Cloud and local control options
  • API access for integrations

Visual: Protocol logos, app store badges

SLIDE 10: Contact

Headline: Build Your Smart Space Subhead: Contact us for product catalogs and pricing

Contact Info:

  • Email: sales@heyzack.ai
  • Website: heyzack.ai/products
  • Catalog: heyzack.ai/catalog

CTA: “Request Product Catalog”

Visual: Gradient background, logo prominent

Formatting Rules

  1. One category per slide — Clear organization
  2. Feature 4 products max per slide — Don’t overwhelm
  3. Consistent product grid layouts — Professional appearance
  4. Key benefit callouts — Why this category matters
  5. Clean backgrounds — Let products shine

Tone & Voice

  • Informative — Focus on what products do
  • Professional — Suitable for B2B audiences
  • Organized — Easy to navigate
  • Comprehensive — Show the full ecosystem
